# Application.WorkbookOpen event (Excel)

Occurs when a fixture workbook is opened.

## Parameters

|Name|Required/Optional|Data type|Description|
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| _Wb_ | Required | **[Workbook](Excel.Workbook.md)** | The workbook. |
